_comment: Curated, stable Unsplash CDN image URLs for the Veloura seed catalog. Every url and source_id is unique; images are grouped by (gender, category) and consumed in order by scripts/seed_products.py so each seeded product gets exactly one unique primary image. Validate with `make validate-seed-images`.
